name: War Tortoise
short_description: War Tortoise is a new type of hybrid idle game, taking core incremental gameplay and adding new features, idle elements, and advanced graphics. Explore, command and upgrade, equip weapons and armor, level up, unlock abilities, recruit heroes and pilots, and more!
detailed_description:
Take control of the mighty War Tortoise and experience a new kind of idle game!

Explore a vast world as nature's strongest battle tank: the War Tortoise. Summon a variety of units such as Mouse Rangers, Hamster Commandos, and giant Howitzer Beetles. Unlock dozens of pilots, heroes, and legendary tortoises to fight beside you. Upgrade your War Tortoise and support units from a huge list of talents and skills. Discover unique gameplay modes such as fishing and a free-roam adventure mode.

FEATURES

  • Experience a unique spin on idle/incremental gameplay, mixing exploration, freedom and depth of choice, advanced graphics, and an interesting setting
  • Explore a huge world - choose where you want to go and how you want to progress
  • Unlock and upgrade countless active and passive abilities - customize your play style
  • Dozens of Pilots and Heroes to collect and master
  • Unleash legendary Tortoises such as the Zombie Tortoise, Dragon Tortoise, and Mecha Tortoise
  • Customize your War Tortoise with powerful armor and weapons
  • Build up your fighting force with a variety of support units
  • Relax at fishing spots and earn powerful permanent abilities
  • Dismount and explore full free-roam adventure locations
  • Full Steam Deck support

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
